description: Settle a matched transaction. Completes scrip movement after a successful match: pays residual to original seller, burns the matching fee, retains exchange revenue. Invariants: price = residual + exchange_revenue; amount = price + fee_burned. reservation_id must reference an active (not settled or refunded) reservation. State effect: seller balance increases by residual, operator balance increases by exchange_revenue, fee_burned destroyed, escrow released.

args.name: reservation_id
args.description: Forge reservation from scrip:buy-hold. Must be active (not settled or refunded).

args.name: seller
args.description: Original seller's Ed25519 public key (hex). Receives residual payment.

args.name: residual
args.description: Residual payment to seller in micro-tokens.

args.name: fee_burned
args.description: Matching fee burned in micro-tokens. Triggers a corresponding scrip:burn message.

args.name: exchange_revenue
args.description: Exchange revenue retained in micro-tokens. price - residual.

args.name: match_msg
args.description: Message ID of the exchange:match operation being settled.

args.name: result_hash
args.description: SHA-256 hex of the delivered cached result.
